# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Write a Kubernetes Deployment for our Node.js microservice. Focus on getting it deployed quickly - we'll optimize resource allocation later based on actual usage metrics. The service handles API requests and connects to a MongoDB database.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: apps/v1 # Kind of Kubernetes object that this deployment is (e.g., Deployment, StatefulSet) 
kind: Deployment        
metadata:    
   name: nodejs-deploy      
spec:   
# Define the pod specifications using yaml syntax for resources like CPU and memory size etc...          
  selector:      # This is used to know which Pods are created by this deployment             
        matchLabels:               
          app : NodeJsApp           
     template:                       
       metadata:                   
         labels:                     
               app:NodeJS            
       spec:                        
           containers:                 
    # Container specifications for the pod  
      - name: nodejs                  
        image: yourimagename/node-app 
          ports:               
            - containerPort :8091    
              protocol : TCP
